content.text: {"is_idiom":true,"idiom_canonical":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_canonical_meaning":"Listen to you; pay attention to what you say or what is being said.","idiom_canonical_meaning_arabic":"استمع إليك؛ انتبه لما تقوله أو ما يُقال.","ambiguity_flag":"semi_literal_possible","idiom_compositionality_level":"semi_opaque","idiom_register":"informal","idiom_domain":"regional","learner_difficulty":"hard","examples":[{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"‘ark at ee, that’s quite an idea you have!","idiom_in_example_arabic":"'ark at ee، هذه فكرة رائعة لديك!","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Listen to you; paying attention to your surprising idea.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"استمع إليك؛ انتبه إلى فكرتك المفاجئة.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"If you 'ark at ee closely, you can hear the leaves rustling.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"إذا 'ark at ee جيدًا، يمكنك سماع أوراق الشجر تتحرك.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Listen carefully to the sounds of nature.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"استمع بعناية لصوت الطبيعة.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"She said, ‘’Ark at ’ee! I bet you haven’t thought about that.’","idiom_in_example_arabic":"قالت: ‘‘Ark at ’ee! أراهن أنك لم تفكر في ذلك.’","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Pay attention to what you just said, which is insightful.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"انتبه لما قلته للتو، فهو مهم.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"‘Ark at ’ee!’ he exclaimed, surprised by the news.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"صرخ: ‘‘Ark at ’ee!’ متفاجئًا من الأخبار.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Expressing disbelief and telling the other to listen to themselves.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"يعبر عن عدم التصديق ويحث الآخر على الانتباه لكلامه.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"The captain shouted, ‘Park at 'ee dock carefully!’","idiom_in_example_arabic":"صرخ القبطان: ‘‘أركن القارب عند رصيف ’إي بعناية!’’","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally instructing to park a boat at a specific dock named 'ee.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"تعليمات حرفية لركن القارب عند رصيف محدد يُدعى ’إي.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"The child said, ‘I can ’ark at ’ee sound from the birds.’","idiom_in_example_arabic":"قال الطفل: ‘‘أستطيع ’ark at ’ee صوت الطيور.’","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally hear a sound coming from the birds.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"يسمع حرفيًا الصوت الصادر من الطيور.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"Farmers ’ark at ’ee cattle every morning during feeding time.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"المزارعون ’ark at ’ee الماشية كل صباح أثناء وقت إطعامها.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally watch or listen carefully to the cattle.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"يراقبون أو يستمعون بعناية للماشية فعليًا.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'ark at 'ee","idiom_in_example":"We ’ark at ’ee sound of the engine before the ship departs.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"نحن ’ark at ’ee صوت المحرك قبل مغادرة السفينة.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally listen to the engine noise before departure.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"نستمع حرفيًا لصوت المحرك قبل الانطلاق.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"}]}

{"is_idiom":true,"idiom_canonical":"'fraid so","idiom_canonical_meaning":"Yes, I am afraid that is the case.","idiom_canonical_meaning_arabic":"نعم، أخشى أن هذا هو الحال.","ambiguity_flag":"semi_literal_possible","idiom_compositionality_level":"transparent","idiom_register":"informal","idiom_domain":"general","learner_difficulty":"easy","examples":[{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"I’m ’fraid so, the project deadline has been moved up to next week.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"أنا أخشى ذلك، فقد تم تقديم موعد تسليم المشروع إلى الأسبوع القادم.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Yes, unfortunately, that is correct (the deadline has been moved).","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"نعم، للأسف، هذا صحيح (تم تقديم الموعد النهائي).","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"‘Is the event still happening tomorrow?’ ‘’Fraid so, even despite the rain.’","idiom_in_example_arabic":"هل سيقام الحدث غداً؟ أخشى ذلك، حتى مع المطر.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Yes, the event will still occur despite the rain.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"نعم، سيقام الحدث رغم المطر.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"‘Did you get the report done?’ ‘’Fraid so, but it took longer than expected.’","idiom_in_example_arabic":"هل أنجزت التقرير؟ أخشى ذلك، لكنه استغرق وقتًا أطول مما كان متوقعًا.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Yes, the report was completed but it took more time.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"نعم، تم إنجاز التقرير لكن استغرق وقتًا أطول.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"‘Are we going to miss the train?’ ‘’Fraid so, it already left.’","idiom_in_example_arabic":"هل سنفوت القطار؟ أخشى ذلك، لقد غادر بالفعل.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Yes, we will miss the train; it has already departed.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"نعم، سنفوت القطار لأنه قد غادر بالفعل.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"He whispered, '’fraid so,' as the haunted house creaked ominously around them.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"همس قائلاً: 'أخشى ذلك' بينما كان منزل الأشباح يصدح بأصوات مخيفة حولهم.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"He literally said 'I am afraid so' in a scared context about the haunted house sounds.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"قال حرفياً 'أخشى ذلك' في سياق خوف من أصوات المنزل المسكون.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"She stammered, '’fraid so,' trying to admit she had broken the vase.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"تلعثمت قائلة: 'أخشى ذلك' وهي تحاول الاعتراف بأنها كسرت المزهرية.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"She literally said 'I am afraid so' as an admission of breaking the vase.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"قالت حرفياً 'أخشى ذلك' كاعتراف بكسر المزهرية.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"The tired cook muttered ’fraid so’ when asked if the meal was ready.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"تمتم الطباخ المتعب قائلاً 'أخشى ذلك' عندما سُئل عما إذا كانت الوجبة جاهزة.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"He literally said 'I am afraid so' to confirm the meal is ready, with some hesitation.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"قال حرفياً 'أخشى ذلك' لتأكيد أن الوجبة جاهزة مع بعض التردد.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'fraid so","idiom_in_example":"’Fraid so,’ she said, explaining that the car was definitely out of gas.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"قالت: 'أخشى ذلك' موضحة أن السيارة فعلاً نفد وقودها.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"She literally said 'I am afraid so' confirming the car has no gasoline.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"قالت حرفياً 'أخشى ذلك' مؤكدة نفاد وقود السيارة.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"}]}

{"is_idiom":true,"idiom_canonical":"'nuff said","idiom_canonical_meaning":"Used to indicate that nothing more needs to be said because everything important has already been stated.","idiom_canonical_meaning_arabic":"تُستخدم للدلالة على أنه لا حاجة لقول المزيد لأن كل الأمور المهمة قد تم ذكرها بالفعل.","ambiguity_flag":"strongly_idiomatic","idiom_compositionality_level":"opaque","idiom_register":"informal","idiom_domain":"general","learner_difficulty":"medium","examples":[{"idiom_surface":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كفى قولاً","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Used to end the discussion, implying nothing more needs to be added.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"تُستخدم لإنهاء النقاش، بمعنى أنه لا حاجة لإضافة أي شيء آخر.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كفى قولاً","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Used to imply a point is so clear or obvious that further explanation is unnecessary.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"تُستخدم للدلالة على أن النقطة واضحة جداً بحيث لا حاجة للمزيد من الشرح.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'nuff said","idiom_in_example":"'nuff said","idiom_in_example_arabic":"بالكاد قيل شيء","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Indicates a conclusion with the idea that more discussion is superfluous.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"تشير إلى الخاتمة مع فكرة أن النقاش الإضافي غير ضروري.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كفى قولاً","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Expresses that the argument or explanation is sufficient.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"تعبر عن أن الحجة أو التفسير كافٍ.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"nuff said","idiom_in_example":"There was just 'nuff said on the table when it came to the contract clauses.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كان هناك فقط ما قيل بالكاد على الطاولة عندما تعلق الأمر ببنود العقد.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literal: barely enough was mentioned during the contract discussion.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"حرفياً: تم ذكر القليل جداً خلال مناقشة العقد.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'nuff said","idiom_in_example":"He wrote 'nuff said' in shorthand during the meeting notes.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كتب 'nuff said' بنظام الاختصارات أثناء ملاحظات الاجتماع.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literal: the phrase was literally written down in notes.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"حرفياً: العبارة كُتبت فعليًا ضمن الملاحظات.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'nuff said","idiom_in_example":"The phrase 'nuff said' was printed on the billboard as a catchy slogan.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"طُبعت عبارة 'nuff said' على اللوحة الإعلانية كشعار جذاب.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literal: the words appear as text on a billboard.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"حرفياً: الكلمات تظهر كنص على لوحة إعلانية.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'Nuff said","idiom_in_example":"There was 'Nuff said' written in graffiti on the wall downtown.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كانت عبارة 'Nuff said' مكتوبة بالكتابة على الجدران في وسط المدينة.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literal: the phrase is physically written on a wall.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"حرفياً: العبارة مكتوبة فعلياً على جدار.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"}]}

{"is_idiom":true,"idiom_canonical":"'tis the season","idiom_canonical_meaning":"It is the time of year around Christmas when activities, moods, or customs associated with the holiday season occur or are expected.","idiom_canonical_meaning_arabic":"إنه الوقت من السنة حول عيد الميلاد، حيث تحدث أو يُتوقع حدوث الأنشطة والمزاجيات أو العادات المرتبطة بموسم الأعياد.","ambiguity_flag":"semi_literal_possible","idiom_compositionality_level":"semi_opaque","idiom_register":"neutral","idiom_domain":"general","learner_difficulty":"medium","examples":[{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"Anyway, 'tis the season to give generously to those in need.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"على أي حال، 'tis the season للتبرع بسخاء لمن يحتاج.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"It is that time of year around Christmas when generosity and giving are encouraged.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"إنه ذلك الوقت من السنة حول عيد الميلاد حيث تُشجع السخاء والعطاء.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"'Tis the season for festive decorations to adorn the streets and homes.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"'Tis the season لتزيين الشوارع والمنازل بزينة الأعياد.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"It is the period of the year, around Christmas, when people decorate extensively in festive styles.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"إنها فترة السنة، حول عيد الميلاد، عندما يزين الناس بشكل مكثف بأشكال احتفالية.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"'Tis the season to reconnect with family and friends after a long year apart.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"'Tis the season لإعادة التواصل مع العائلة والأصدقاء بعد عام طويل من البعد.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"It is the customary time of the year, near Christmas, for social reunion and strengthening relationships.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"إنها فترة السنة المعتادة، قرب عيد الميلاد، للالتقاء اجتماعياً وتعزيز العلاقات.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"Although sales are down, 'tis the season when profits usually increase due to holiday shopping.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"على الرغم من انخفاض المبيعات، 'tis the season عندما تزيد الأرباح عادة بسبب التسوق في العطلات.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"It is the typical Christmas season when businesses expect higher profits because customers shop more.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"إنه موسم عيد الميلاد النموذجي عندما تتوقع الأعمال أرباحاً أعلى بسبب زيادة تسوق العملاء.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"'Tis the season when winter finally arrives with colder temperatures and snow.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"'Tis the season عندما تصل الشتاء أخيراً مع درجات حرارة أبرد وتساقط الثلوج.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally, it is the time of year when winter weather begins.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"بمعناه الحرفي، إنه الوقت من السنة عندما يبدأ الطقس الشتوي.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"Farmers say 'tis the season to plant early crops before the first frost.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"يقول المزارعون 'tis the season لزرع المحاصيل المبكرة قبل أول صقيع.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally, it is the particular time of year suited for planting certain crops.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"بمعناه الحرفي، إنه الوقت من السنة المناسب لزراعة بعض المحاصيل.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"'Tis the season for allergies as pollen counts rise during springtime.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"'Tis the season للحساسية مع ارتفاع معدلات حبوب اللقاح في الربيع.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally, it is the time of year when seasonal allergies typically occur.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"بمعناه الحرفي، إنه الوقت من السنة حيث تحدث الحساسية الموسمية عادةً.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"'tis the season","idiom_in_example":"The local park says 'tis the season to feed the ducks before they migrate south.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"تقول الحديقة المحلية 'tis the season لإطعام البط قبل هجرتهم جنوباً.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Literally, it is the time of year when ducks prepare to migrate, encouraging feeding now.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"بمعناه الحرفي، إنه الوقت من السنة عندما يستعد البط للهجرة، مما يشجع على إطعامهم الآن.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"}]}

{"is_idiom":true,"idiom_canonical":"110 proof","idiom_canonical_meaning":"Exceptionally strong or powerful, beyond the usual standard of strength.","idiom_canonical_meaning_arabic":"قوي أو فعّال بشكل استثنائي، يتجاوز المستوى المعتاد للقوة.","ambiguity_flag":"semi_literal_possible","idiom_compositionality_level":"transparent","idiom_register":"neutral","idiom_domain":"general","learner_difficulty":"medium","examples":[{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"He needed to be 110 proof to survive the harsh challenges of the business world.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كان عليه أن يكون بقوة 110 للحفاظ على البقاء في تحديات عالم الأعمال القاسية.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"He needed to be exceptionally strong and resilient to survive the challenges.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"كان عليه أن يكون قويًا جدًا ومتينًا لتجاوز التحديات.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"Her confidence was 110 proof as she faced the stage for her presentation.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كانت ثقتها قوية جدًا عندما واجهت المنصة لعرضها.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"Her confidence was exceptionally strong and unwavering.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"كانت ثقتها قوية للغاية وثابتة.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"The novel was 110 proof in its portrayal of human emotions, raw and intense.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كان الرواية قوية جدًا في تصويرها للمشاعر الإنسانية، خامّة وعنيفة.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"The novel’s portrayal was exceptionally powerful and intense.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"كان تصوير الرواية قويًا جدًا ومكثفًا.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"That argument was 110 proof, leaving no room for doubt.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"كان ذلك الحُجة قوية جدًا، ولم تترك مجالاً للشك.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"The argument was exceptionally strong and convincing.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"كانت الحجة قوية جدًا ومقنعة.","is_example_idiom":true,"example_usage_label":"idiomatic"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"The whiskey I bought was labeled as 110 proof, indicating a high alcohol content.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"الويسكي الذي اشتريته كان مكتوبًا عليه 110 برووف، مما يدل على محتوى عالي من الكحول.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"The label shows the whiskey has an alcohol content of 55% (means literally strong alcohol).","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"العلامة تُظهر أن الويسكي يحتوي على 55% كحول (يعني حرفيًا كحول قوي).","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"Standard vodka is usually 80 proof, but this one is 110 proof for extra strength.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"الفودكا العادية عادةً تكون 80 برووف، لكن هذه 110 برووف لقوة إضافية.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"The vodka has a higher alcohol concentration literally measured at 110 proof.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"الفودكا تحتوي على تركيز كحول أعلى مقاسًا حرفياً بـ 110 برووف.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"The moonshine was 110 proof, making it dangerous to drink in large amounts.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"الشيريهان كانت 110 برووف، مما يجعلها خطيرة للشرب بكميات كبيرة.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"The moonshine has an alcohol content measured at 110 proof, meaning very strong liquor.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"الشيريهان يحتوي على نسبة كحول مقدارها 110 برووف، وهو خمرة قوية جدًا.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"},{"idiom_surface":"110 proof","idiom_in_example":"He tested the ethanol sample and confirmed it was exactly 110 proof.","idiom_in_example_arabic":"اختبر عينة الإيثانول وأكد أنها بالفعل 110 برووف بالضبط.","idiom_in_example_meaning_en":"The ethanol sample was measured literally as 110 proof alcohol content.","idiom_in_example_meaning_arabic":"تم قياس عينة الإيثانول حرفيًا بنسبة كحول 110 برووف.","is_example_idiom":false,"example_usage_label":"literal"}]}
